transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my electrical panel is hot to the touch and it's getting bad! This is Susan Diaz at 22 Oak Court. Dispatcher: Okay Susan, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 22 Oak Court right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: electrical panel is hot to the touch
